name: Woolworths Holdings Limited
reporting_currency: ZAR (Country Road Group reports in AUD)
registered_address: Woolworths House, 93 Longmarket Street, Cape Town, 8001
operating_subsidiaries: Woolworths (Pty) Ltd (Woolworths SA): Food; Fashion, Beauty & Home; Woolworths Ventures
Country Road Group (Pty) Ltd (Australia): Country Road, Witchery, Trenery, Mimco, Politix

key_people.crg_managing_director: Steven Cook (from Jul 2025; succeeded Raju Vuppalapati)

notes: David Jones sold/separated (2023). Melbourne Bourke Street property sold FY2025 (A$223.5m, R792m profit). Share buyback programme commenced Sept 2025. Note: distinct from Australian 'Woolworths Group' (ASX:WOW) — unrelated company.
download_note: Source PDFs could not be saved as binaries (workspace proxy blocks the IR domain). Catalogued as extracted text via web fetch, consistent with manifest text_source convention.
